evidence_supported_numeric_trends: Data center revenue accounted for the dominant growth contribution.
Microsoft cloud revenue grew in FY2024.
Cloud growth exceeded the reported drag from weaker segments.
JPMorgan FY2024 net income was strong.
Reported FY2024 revenue is inside the cited range.
Management guidance range is contemporaneous with the period.
Deck margin chart shows margin progress.
Filing operating margin reconciles to the deck direction.
Cloud guidance improved in management commentary.
inferences: Data center contribution is a supported inference from segment share evidence.
Cloud offset is supported by segment contribution and management discussion.
Services mix is a plausible inference, but not a fully supported causal conclusion.
AWS growth and retail pressure are both supported numeric facts.
Net interest income contribution is supported as a component of earnings strength.
The guidance narrative is supported because actuals reconcile to the cited range.
Deck chart and filing metric support margin progress.
Cloud guidance and cloud revenue growth are supported.
memo.title: Narrative and Causal Claim Verification Memo
unsupported_causal_attributions: Demand was the primary causal driver, but no direct demand evidence is present.
Services mix causality is not directly supported against the one-time cost-cut alternative.
Primary-cause wording is unsupported without a driver attribution bridge.
Automation-driven causality is unsupported by the extracted deck evidence.
AI demand as the cause of guidance improvement remains insufficiently supported.

overclaim_examples.claim_text: NVIDIA's FY2024 revenue growth was mainly driven by data center demand.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: numeric or narrative evidence exists, but causal attribution is not directly supported

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Apple's FY2024 margin improvement came from Services mix rather than one-time cost cuts.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: numeric or narrative evidence exists, but causal attribution is not directly supported

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Amazon's FY2024 AWS growth was strong while retail margins remained pressured.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: ordinary RAG overstates the level of support

overclaim_examples.claim_text: JPMorgan's FY2024 earnings strength was primarily caused by net interest income rather than credit releases.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: numeric or narrative evidence exists, but causal attribution is not directly supported

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Tesla's FY2024 operating margin improved versus FY2023.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: ordinary RAG accepts narrative language despite a numeric contradiction

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Meta's FY2024 AI infrastructure risk exposure materially decreased.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: ordinary RAG accepts optimistic language despite contradictory filed narrative evidence

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Walmart's FY2024 investor deck showed margin progress driven by automation.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: numeric or narrative evidence exists, but causal attribution is not directly supported

overclaim_examples.claim_text: Alphabet's FY2024 cloud guidance improved because AI demand accelerated.
overclaim_examples.failure_reason: numeric or narrative evidence exists, but causal attribution is not directly supported
